ships.name: Celebrity Edge
features: The Retreat suite area with private restaurant, lounge and sundeck
ships.notes: guests=double occupancy; year not on official page

exp.overview: The first ship in Celebrity's revolutionary Edge Series, Celebrity Edge introduced the cantilevered, floating Magic Carpet and an outward-facing design that turns the whole ship toward the sea. It carries about 2,918 guests across 29 distinct restaurants, bars, and lounges.

neighbourhoods.name: The Retreat
neighbourhoods.desc: Suite-guest-only area with the private Luminae restaurant, a private Retreat Lounge, and a Retreat Sundeck.

neighbourhoods.name: Resort Deck
neighbourhoods.desc: Central open-air pool and lounging deck.

neighbourhoods.name: Eden
neighbourhoods.desc: Signature three-level indoor/outdoor neighborhood spanning dining, a cafe, a bar, and entertainment.

dining.name: Fine Cut Steakhouse
dining.desc: Upscale steak and seafood venue where service is elevated to an art form.

dining.name: Rooftop Garden Grill
dining.desc: Open-air corner of the Rooftop Garden serving gourmet backyard-BBQ favorites under open sky with ocean views.

dining.name: Raw on 5
dining.desc: Sophisticated raw bar showcasing oysters, crab, lobster, and sushi.

dining.name: Dinner on the Edge
dining.desc: Sky-high open-air dinner served when the Magic Carpet ascends to the top of the ship.

dining.name: Le Grand Bistro
dining.desc: French bistro with a boulangerie-patisserie ambiance.

dining.name: Le Petit Chef
dining.desc: Custom 3D table-animation dining choreographed by the Skullmapping artists.

dining.name: Eden Restaurant
dining.desc: Three-level venue with an open kitchen and innovative dishes inspired by nature and the regions visited.

dining.name: Main restaurants (four complimentary)
dining.desc: Four included main dining rooms including Normandie, which serves contemporary French cuisine in a refined space evoking springtime in Paris.

dining.name: Luminae
dining.desc: Private restaurant reserved for The Retreat suite guests.

dining.name: Blu
dining.desc: Clean-cuisine restaurant reserved for AquaClass guests.

dining.name: Eden Cafe
dining.desc: Casual daytime cafe within the Eden venue.

activities.name: Magic Carpet
activities.desc: Cantilevered floating platform reaching 13 stories above the sea, with seating, a bar, and live music; moves between decks to serve different functions.

activities.name: Rooftop Garden
activities.desc: Open-air upper-deck garden space for relaxing and outdoor dining.

activities.name: Resort Deck / Pools
activities.desc: Reimagined terraced pool deck offering greater sea views.

activities.name: The Spa & Fitness Center
activities.desc: Wellness facility for treatments, relaxation, and fitness.

entertainment.name: Eden
entertainment.desc: Immersive multi-level venue that transforms from calm mornings to playful afternoons to lively evenings of dining and entertainment.

entertainment.name: The Theatre
entertainment.desc: Contemporary performance space designed to blur the line between audience and stage.

entertainment.name: Grand Plaza
entertainment.desc: Three-story social hub inspired by the piazzas of Italy, with bars and live music.

exp.kids_family: Camp at Sea offers arts, crafts, and family-oriented activities for children and teens.
exp.who_for: Design-forward couples and travelers who want a modern, resort-style ship with a strong specialty-dining scene, the signature Magic Carpet, and a private suite retreat rather than a big kids-and-waterslides experience.
exp.deploy_note: Ship page lists Alaska and Australia & New Zealand itineraries; Alaska sails from US/Canada West Coast ports (Seattle/Vancouver).

ships.name: Celebrity Apex
ships.notes: guests=double occupancy; year not on official page

exp.overview: The second Edge-Series ship, Celebrity Apex carries about 2,910 guests and shares the series' outward-facing design, the Magic Carpet, and 29 distinct restaurants, bars, and lounges. It holds a Forbes Travel Guide Four-Star rating.

neighbourhoods.name: The Retreat
neighbourhoods.desc: Suite-guest area with a private restaurant, sundeck, and lounge.

neighbourhoods.name: Eden
neighbourhoods.desc: Signature multi-level neighborhood for dining and entertainment.

dining.name: Normandie
dining.desc: One of the four complimentary main restaurants, serving contemporary French cuisine in a modern, refined space evoking springtime in Paris.

dining.name: Rooftop Garden Grill
dining.desc: Open-air grill serving gourmet BBQ favorites with ocean views.

dining.name: Raw on 5
dining.desc: Raw bar of oysters, crab, lobster, and sushi.

dining.name: Eden Restaurant
dining.desc: Multi-level venue with an open kitchen and nature-inspired dishes.

dining.name: Luminae
dining.desc: Private restaurant for The Retreat suite guests.

activities.name: Magic Carpet
activities.desc: Signature cantilevered floating platform with a bar and live music.

activities.name: Rooftop Garden
activities.desc: Open-air upper-deck garden offering carefree, relaxed pleasures.

activities.name: Spa & Fitness Center

entertainment.name: The Theatre
entertainment.desc: Contemporary space designed to blur the line between audience and performance.

entertainment.name: Eden
entertainment.desc: Immersive venue that transforms from calm mornings to playful afternoons to lively evenings.

entertainment.name: Grand Plaza
entertainment.desc: Three-story venue inspired by the piazzas of Italy.

exp.kids_family: Camp at Sea offers arts, crafts, and family activities for children and teens.
exp.who_for: Travelers who want the modern Edge-Series experience -- Magic Carpet, Eden, Grand Plaza, and a strong specialty-dining lineup -- in a slightly more intimate ship than the larger Beyond and Ascent.

ships.name: Celebrity Beyond
ships.notes: guests=double occupancy; year 2022 per official naming-ceremony note on page

exp.overview: Celebrity Beyond is the third and larger Edge-Series ship, carrying about 3,260 guests across 32 distinct restaurants, bars, and lounges, and adds Chef Daniel Boulud's first restaurant at sea, Le Voyage. Celebrity calls it the gold-standard ship in the fleet.

neighbourhoods.name: The Retreat
neighbourhoods.desc: Suite-guest area with a private restaurant (Luminae), sundeck, and lounge.

neighbourhoods.name: Resort Deck
neighbourhoods.desc: Central open-air pool and lounging deck.

neighbourhoods.name: Eden
neighbourhoods.desc: Signature multi-level neighborhood for dining and entertainment.

dining.name: Le Voyage by Daniel Boulud
dining.desc: Chef Daniel Boulud's first signature restaurant at sea; travel-inspired dishes in an intimate, upscale setting.

dining.name: Fine Cut Steakhouse
dining.desc: Premium cuts including grass-fed lamb chops and pan-roasted Maine lobster tail.

dining.name: Rooftop Garden Grill
dining.desc: Casual open-air grill with ocean views at the Rooftop Garden.

dining.name: Raw on 5
dining.desc: Seafood venue with signature lobster roll, shrimp salad, sushi, and sashimi.

dining.name: Le Grand Bistro
dining.desc: Inspired by classic French bistros with a boulangerie-patisserie atmosphere.

dining.name: Le Petit Chef
dining.desc: Interactive 3D table-animation dining with a chef-created menu.

dining.name: Eden Restaurant
dining.desc: Personal culinary journeys with plant-based and international options.

dining.name: Luminae
dining.desc: Private restaurant for The Retreat suite guests.

activities.name: Magic Carpet
activities.desc: Cantilevered floating platform with bar and live music.

activities.name: Lawn Club
activities.desc: Real-grass open-air lawn space on the top deck.

activities.name: Rooftop Garden
activities.desc: Expanded open-air garden and lounging space.

activities.name: Resort Deck / Pools
activities.desc: Central pool deck with expanded open-air areas.

activities.name: The Spa & Fitness Center
activities.desc: Wellness and fitness facility.

entertainment.name: Eden
entertainment.desc: Immersive multi-level dining and entertainment venue.

entertainment.name: Grand Plaza
entertainment.desc: Multi-story central social hub with live music.

exp.kids_family: Camp at Sea offers arts, crafts, and family activities for children and teens.
exp.who_for: Guests who want the fullest Edge-Series experience -- an expanded Rooftop Garden and Resort Deck, more open-air space, and marquee dining like Le Voyage -- on Caribbean and Panama Canal sailings from Florida.
exp.deploy_note: Ship page lists Caribbean and Panama Canal itineraries, including Perfect Day at CocoCay, sailing from Florida.

ships.name: Celebrity Ascent
features: 32 restaurants, bars and lounges incl. Le Voyage by Daniel Boulud
Multi-deck Sunset Bar by Nate Berkus
Rooftop Garden with two cantilevered floating pools

ships.name: Celebrity Solstice
features: Trattoria Rossa and Fine Cut Steakhouse
ships.notes: guests=double occupancy; year not on official page (page notes 2026 refurbishment)

exp.overview: The lead ship of the Solstice Class, Celebrity Solstice carries about 2,852 guests and features the signature half-acre real-grass Lawn Club on its top deck. It was refurbished in 2026 with new venues including Trattoria Rossa, Fine Cut Steakhouse, and a Chef's Table by Chef Daniel Boulud.

ships.name: Celebrity Flora
features: Certified Galapagos National Park naturalists on board
ships.notes: guests=double occupancy; Galapagos expedition ship; year not on official page

exp.overview: Celebrity Flora is a purpose-built, all-suite expedition ship designed exclusively for the Galapagos Islands, carrying just 100 guests with certified Galapagos National Park naturalists on board to guide the journey. It holds a Forbes Travel Guide Four-Star rating.

activities.name: Naturalist Expeditions
activities.desc: Certified naturalists from the Galapagos National Park guide daily excursions and exploration.

activities.name: Suite amenities
activities.desc: All suites include full room automation, private verandas, in-room water filtration, a personal suite attendant, and complimentary laundry service twice per cruise.

exp.who_for: Luxury travelers seeking an intimate, all-inclusive, all-suite Galapagos expedition focused on responsible tourism and naturalist-led exploration rather than large-ship amenities.

dining.name: All-inclusive dining
dining.desc: All dining is included in the all-inclusive, all-suite experience; specific venue names are not listed on the official ship overview page.

exp.deploy_note: Deployed exclusively in the Galapagos Islands (does not sail from US/Canada ports); guests fly to Ecuador to embark.

needs_manual: Celebrity Xcel: gross tonnage, double-occupancy guests, and year entered service not shown on official ship page (marketing-only page)
